visa_types.name: Business Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click here for Documents required
Notes:
- For documents, an applicant needs to submit one set of hard copies. Kindly carry your original supporting documents required only for verification.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees for all visa categories is to be paid online while filling Visa application form on Nigerian Immigration portal. 
All applicants need to pay a mandatory service fee of 91.45 euro (Inclusive of taxes) to be paid during application submission at visa application center.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time for the application at the Embassy of Nigeria is mininum7 working days.
All application submitted today will be processed the next working day please plan your travel and submission accordingly.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa is for those applicants who wish to travel to Nigeria for the purpose of Business conference and meetings, attending conferences and any other Business related meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa is for those applicants who wish to travel to Nigeria for the purpose of Business conference and meetings, attending conferences and any other Business related meetings.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees for all visa categories is to be paid online while filling Visa application form on Nigerian Immigration portal. 
All applicants need to pay a mandatory service fee of 91.45 euro (Inclusive of taxes) to be paid during application submission at visa application center.

## Documents Required
Please click here for Documents required
Notes:
- For documents, an applicant needs to submit one set of hard copies. Kindly carry your original supporting documents required only for verification.

## Photo Specifications

[Table:     Business Visa ]

[Table:     Business Visa ]

[Table:     Business Visa ]

[Table:     Business Visa ]

## Processing Time
The processing time for the application at the Embassy of Nigeria is mininum7 working days.
All application submitted today will be processed the next working day please plan your travel and submission accordingly.

## Online Application Form
Kindly click here  (https://portal.immigration.gov.ng/visa/freshVisa)to fill online application form.
Please note that for submission of application at visa center it is important to carry printout of online application form duly filled online, payment acknowledgement receipt
                                                                                of visa fees and copy of appointment letter schedule online.
Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/deu/en/nga/book-an-appointment) to schedule an appointment to submit your application at Nigeria visa application center.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Transit visa is for those applicants who wish to travel to Nigeria for the purpose of transiting Nigeria and then traveling to another country.
visa_types.full_text:
